main.pause_tooltip: Pause transcription; click again to resume
main.load_history_tooltip: Load existing transcripts and summaries from output directory
main.open_viewer_tooltip: Open results in a separate window with fullscreen, search, export, and bookmark features
main.summarize_tooltip: Summarize the text in the Transcript tab only
main.combine_tooltip: Run speech-to-text, then automatically summarize the transcript
main.transcript_placeholder: Editable — Ctrl+S to save, Ctrl+F to find & replace, right-click files for re-transcribe/summarize
main.summary_placeholder: Editable summary — Ctrl+S to save, Ctrl+F to find & replace.
main.tx_prompt_placeholder: Scene instructions, domain terms to improve accuracy, keep concise
main.hotwords_placeholder: Hotwords, space-separated, key domain terms, keep concise
main.summary_prompt_placeholder: Custom summary prompt (optional); leave empty for default
main.markdown_tooltip:
Enable to auto-apply Markdown formatting to summaries.
For custom Markdown, edit the markdown_prompt field in prompts.json directly.
main.remove_file_dialog:
Source file not found: {name}
Please load a directory containing this file first.
main.task_running_warning: A task is currently running. Please wait for it to complete.
main.no_input_dialog: Please select input files or a folder first.
main.no_summarize_dialog: Please select files or a folder and finish transcription before summarizing.
main.incremental_all_done: Incremental mode: all files already have transcripts and summaries, nothing to do.
main.no_video_dialog: Please finish transcription or load history files first
main.tx_prompt_empty_warning: Both initial prompt and hot words are empty; cannot save.
main.tx_prompt_reserved_warning: 「{name}」 is a reserved name; please use a different one.
main.tx_prompt_select_to_delete: Please select a transcription prompt template to delete first.
main.prompt_empty_warning: Prompt content is empty; cannot save.
main.prompt_reserved_warning: 「{name}」 is a reserved name; please use a different one.
main.prompt_select_to_delete: Please select a prompt template to delete first.
main.tab_transcript_hint: Transcript — editable, Ctrl+S to save, Ctrl+F to find & replace
main.tab_summary_hint: Summary — editable, Ctrl+S to save, Ctrl+F to find & replace
main.no_media_in_folder: No supported media files found in this folder or its subfolders
main.incremental_skip_detail: Incremental mode: skipped {name} — transcript and summary already exist in {dir}
main.confirm_download_msg:
It is recommended to use models already downloaded in your cloud drive; HuggingFace usually cannot be accessed directly.

To use another model, copy its core files into the models directory and update the model path in settings.

Start downloading the model?
main.pipeline_done_both: Transcribe: success {tx_ok} / failed {tx_fail} | Summarize: success {sum_ok} / failed {sum_fail}
main.bg_load_fail: Failed to load this image. Please choose another.
main.config_save_fail_warn: Failed to save main window background image config: {err}
main.transcribe_pause_waiting: Waiting for current audio/segment to finish before pausing...
main.stop_requested: ├─ ⏹ Stop request received, attempting to terminate task...
main.stop_force_terminate: ├─ ⚠ Worker thread did not respond to exit request, force terminating...
main.dep_check_skip_warn: Startup dependency check failed, skipped (main UI still works)
main.dep_all_ready: All dependencies ready, no download needed
main.dep_user_cancel: User cancelled download, future auto-checks disabled
main.dep_user_confirmed: User confirmed download, starting background thread...
main.dep_check_warn_user: Dependency check failed. Please verify before transcription; the app can still be used normally
main.dep_download_start: Starting dependency download: model=%s, dll=%s, keep_archive=%s

about.title: About Video2Text
about.desc: High-precision speech transcription and intelligent summarization powered by faster-whisper.

status.no_file_selected: Please select a video/audio file first

dep.title: Dependency Download
dep.intro:
The following runtime dependencies are incomplete; transcription may not work.
Please choose what to download (or click "Cancel" to skip and handle it later in Settings):
dep.model_yes: Yes, download model (required for first use)
dep.dll_group: DLL Dependencies (cuBLAS / cuDNN, for GPU acceleration)
dep.dll_yes: Yes, download DLL (recommended for dedicated GPU)

file_select.title: Select Media Files
file_select.info_prefix: Found {count} media files, please select the ones to process:
file_select.mirror_tooltip: When enabled, output directory mirrors input directory structure

viewer.no_bookmarks:
No bookmarks yet
Ctrl+B to add a bookmark
viewer.duplicate_bookmark_confirm: A bookmark already exists at this position. Add anyway?
viewer.confirm_delete_bookmark: Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark?
viewer.confirm_clear_bookmarks: Are you sure you want to clear all bookmarks?
viewer.bookmark_not_in_list_msg:
The bookmark's file is not in the current list.

File located at:
{path}

Switch to that directory and load?
viewer.select_bookmarks_to_delete: Please select bookmarks to delete first
viewer.load_image_failed: Failed to load this image file. Please choose another.

summarization_tab.ollama_not_found_msg:
Ollama command not found. Please install Ollama.
Download from https://ollama.com/download
summarization_tab.status_connect_fail: Connection failed, check API Key and network
summarization_tab.status_connect_fail_ollama: Connection failed, check if Ollama service is running
summarization_tab.status_no_models: No models found or connection failed
summarization_tab.status_stop_external: Ollama was not started by this app, cannot stop
summarization_tab.log_nvidia_ok: NVIDIA API connection: ✓ success ({latency_ms:.0f}ms) | url={url} model={model}
summarization_tab.log_nvidia_fail: NVIDIA API connection: ✗ failed | url={url} model={model}
summarization_tab.log_ollama_fail: Ollama connection: ✗ failed | reason={reason} url={url} model={model}
summarization_tab.log_ollama_start_not_found: Ollama service: ✗ ollama command not found

summ_tooltips.model_name: Ollama model name, click 'Refresh Model List' to get available models
summ_tooltips.max_length: Max tokens for summary, long text recommended 10000+
summ_tooltips.temperature: Temperature (0~2), lower is more deterministic, recommended 0.3~0.8
summ_tooltips.nvidia_mode: NVIDIA mode: single (single thread, supports stream), multi (multi thread concurrent)
summ_tooltips.nvidia_thread_count: Concurrent thread count for multi-thread mode
summ_tooltips.nvidia_stream: Enable stream output (single thread only): true / false

fav.empty_both: Both input and output are empty, cannot favorite.
fav.input_empty_already: Input directory list is already empty
fav.output_empty_already: Output directory list is already empty

gui_workers.pause_requested: ├─ ⏸ Summary pause requested, waiting for current task…

cli.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to {provider} summarization service, check config
cli.warn_cannot_connect: [yellow]Warning: cannot connect to {provider} service, skipping summary[/yellow]

errors.ffmpeg_not_found:
FFmpeg not found: {path}
Make sure ffmpeg/bin/ exists in the program directory and contains ffmpeg.exe.
errors.ffprobe_not_found:
ffprobe not found: {path}
Make sure ffmpeg/bin/ exists in the program directory and contains ffprobe.exe.

settings.lang_restart: Language setting saved. Restart the application to apply.

errors.no_audio: Media file has no audio track, cannot extract audio: {path}
errors.mp3_not_generated: Fallback: MP3 file was not generated
errors.audio_thumbnail_unsupported: Thumbnail generation is not supported for audio files

log.fallback_pcm_failed: VideoProcessor: ⚠ pcm_s16le failed, falling back to libmp3lame
log.fallback_audio_not_generated: VideoProcessor: ⚠ Audio not generated, falling back
log.timestamp_exceeds_duration: VideoProcessor: ⚠ Timestamp %.1fs exceeds duration %.1fs, using first frame
log.frame_rate_parse_failed: VideoProcessor: ⚠ Frame rate parse failed (%s), defaulting to 0

chat.placeholder: Click the record button above to start voice transcription

status.model_not_ready: ● Model not loaded yet, please wait...
status.multi_select: Multi-select: click items to select, right-click for batch operations
status.edit_mode: Edit mode: modify content then right-click and choose [Save] to finish

delete_conv.title: Delete Conversation
delete_conv.msg:
Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
This will also delete the JSON file on disk and cannot be undone.

dialog.no_selection: Please select conversations to delete first

batch_delete.title: Batch Delete
batch_delete.msg:
Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} conversation(s)?
This operation cannot be undone.

delete_all.title: Delete All
delete_all.msg:
Are you sure you want to delete all {count} conversation(s)?
This operation cannot be undone.

delete_msg.title: Delete Message
delete_msg.msg: Are you sure you want to delete this message?

app.log_level: Log level: DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR
app.incremental_mode: If enabled, skip files that already have transcript/summary in output dir: true / false
app.is_check_model_file: Check model file integrity on startup (auto-download if missing). Set to false after first pass: true / false
app.is_check_dll_file: Check cuBLAS/cuDNN DLL integrity on startup (download from GitHub if missing). Set to false after first pass: true / false
app.proxy: HTTP proxy (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7890), leave empty to disable
app.ui_language: Application UI language, requires restart to take effect
app.result_image_path: Background image path for Result Viewer, supports relative and absolute paths
app.main_image_path: Main window background image path, supports relative and absolute paths

transcription.model_path: faster-whisper model directory name, or full path
transcription.device: Inference device: cuda (NVIDIA GPU), cpu, auto
transcription.language: Transcription language code: zh, en, ja, etc. Leave empty or 'auto' for auto-detection
transcription.beam_size: Beam size (1~10), higher is more accurate but slower
transcription.temperature: Sampling temperature: comma-separated values (e.g. 0.0,0.2,0.4) for fallback. 0 = greedy
transcription.condition_on_previous_text: Condition on previous text for generation. Recommend False for long audio: True / False
transcription.best_of: Number of candidates when temperature > 0 (sampling). Not used when greedy (single 0.0)
transcription.compute_type: Compute type: float16, int8, float32. int8 uses least VRAM. CPU does not support float16
transcription.vad_filter: Enable VAD to filter silence and reduce hallucinations: True / False
transcription.compression_ratio_threshold: Gzip compression ratio threshold for repetition detection, default 2.4
transcription.repetition_penalty: Penalty for repeated tokens, >1 suppresses repetition, default 1.0
transcription.no_repeat_ngram_size: N-gram size to prevent repetition, 0 to disable
transcription.vad_threshold: VAD speech threshold (0~1), raise for noisy environments (0.6~0.7), default 0.5
transcription.vad_min_silence_ms: Minimum silence duration (ms) for segment split, default 2000
transcription.vad_speech_pad_ms: Speech padding (ms) at segment boundaries, default 400

preprocessing.max_chunk_duration: Max chunk duration (s) for long audio splitting

output.output_dir: Output directory, supports relative and absolute paths
output.transcript_format: Transcript output format: txt, srt, vtt, json (comma-separated)
output.mirror_enabled: Enable output directory mirroring: True / False
output.mirror_depth: Mirror directory depth (1~10), controls how many subdirectory levels to mirror

text_processing.max_gap: Max gap (s) for segment merging, segments farther apart won't merge
text_processing.min_length: Min text length for merging, shorter segments try to merge with neighbors

voice_to_text.voice_dir: Voice recording and conversation storage directory
voice_to_text.realtime_auto_send_interval: Real-time auto-send interval (s) for voice transcription
voice_to_text.model_path: Whisper model directory name or path
voice_to_text.device: Inference device: cuda (NVIDIA GPU), cpu, auto
voice_to_text.compute_type: Compute type: float16, int8, float32. CPU does not support float16
voice_to_text.language: Transcription language code: zh, en, ja, etc. Leave empty or 'auto'
voice_to_text.vad_filter: Enable VAD to filter silence and reduce hallucinations: True / False
voice_to_text.vad_threshold: VAD speech threshold (0~1), raise for noisy environments, default 0.5
voice_to_text.vad_min_silence_ms: Minimum silence (ms) for segment split, default 2000
voice_to_text.vad_speech_pad_ms: Speech padding (ms) at segment boundaries, default 400
voice_to_text.initial_prompt: Initial prompt for transcription, useful for context enhancement
voice_to_text.bg_image_path: Background image path for Voice-to-Text interface, leave empty to disable
voice_to_text.vad_endpoint_detection: Enable real-time VAD endpoint detection: True / False
voice_to_text.vad_silence_frames: Consecutive silence frames to end speech (each ~32ms)
voice_to_text.vad_min_speech_frames: Minimum speech frames for valid speech (each ~32ms)
voice_to_text.context_max_chars: Maximum context characters for continuous transcription

transcription.pause_requested: Transcription pause requested, waiting for current task to complete…
transcription.timeout: Transcription timed out ({timeout}s), please check CUDA dependencies
transcription.ffmpeg_no_chunks: FFmpeg audio chunking failed, no chunks generated: {path}
transcription.estimate_from_segments: Estimating from transcript segment end time: {value}s
transcription.estimate_fallback: Chunk duration estimation failed, falling back to 0s (no timestamp offset)

summarization.pause_requested: Summarization pause requested, waiting for current task to complete…
summarization.concurrent_no_stream: Concurrent mode does not support streaming, automatically switched to non-streaming
summarization.unknown_provider: Unknown provider '{provider}', falling back to Ollama

ollama.cmd_not_found: ollama command not found, please make sure Ollama is installed
ollama.process_exited: Ollama service process exited, return code: {code}
ollama.start_no_response: Ollama service did not respond within 5 seconds, continuing
ollama.stream_json_error: Ollama streaming response JSON parse failed: {line}
ollama.service_cmd_not_found: Ollama service: ollama command not found
ollama.service_unreachable: Ollama service: started but {count} checks could not connect ({url})

nvidia.env_missing_key: NvidiaClient: NVIDIA_API_KEY not found in .env file, please add: NVIDIA_API_KEY=your_api_key
nvidia.env_not_found: NvidiaClient: .env file not found, please create and configure NVIDIA_API_KEY
nvidia.rate_limited: NVIDIA API rate limited (429), retrying in {wait}s

file_writer.empty_transcript: Transcript is empty (no speech detected), cannot write {fmt} file: {filename}
file_writer.empty_content: Formatted content is empty, cannot write {fmt} file: {filename}
file_writer.empty_merged: Merged segments are empty, cannot write file: {filename}
file_writer.empty_keywords: Keyword list is empty, cannot write file: {filename}

config_manager.settings_config_not_found: Settings: ⚠ Config not found ({name}), using defaults

transcriber.cuda_dll_missing: CUDA dependencies missing (cuBLAS/cuDNN DLL not found): {files}. GPU transcription unavailable. Please download dependencies via Settings, or switch to CPU in transcription settings.
transcriber.faster_whisper_not_installed: faster_whisper not installed. Run: pip install faster-whisper
transcriber.model_load_failed_oom: Model loading failed: GPU out of memory and CPU fallback also failed. Please close other GPU programs or use a smaller model.
transcriber.model_not_loaded: Model not loaded or has been unloaded
transcriber.model_not_loaded_yet: Model not loaded yet, please call load_model() first
transcriber.model_not_exists_download: Transcriber: ⚠ Model not found, will download ({path})
transcriber.dll_precheck_failed: Transcriber: ⚠ libs/ DLL pre-check failed ({files}), ctranslate2 will try to use system/PyTorch CUDA libraries. If transcription fails, please re-download dependencies via Settings or switch to CPU
transcriber.oom_fallback: Transcriber: ⚠ Out of memory, attempting fallback
transcriber.skip_unload_loading: Transcriber: ⚠ Model is loading, skipping unload

download.complete_416: File already complete (HTTP 416), no download needed
download.no_resume: Server does not support resume, downloading from scratch
download.no_content_length: Resume response missing content-length, downloading from scratch

extract.no_7z: 7z extractor not found (7za.exe / 7z.exe). Please place 7za.exe in the program root, 7z/ subdirectory, or install 7-Zip and retry.

status.already_complete: DLL dependencies already complete, no download needed
status.proxy_fail: Proxy connection failed, please check proxy settings
status.no_access: Cannot access download URL (GitHub direct unreachable and no proxy configured)
status.config_hint: Please set proxy in config.ini [app] section
status.check_and_fill: DLL dependency: checking and filling (download → extract)

download.proxy_fail: Proxy connection failed, please check {source} proxy
download.no_access: Cannot access HuggingFace (direct unreachable and no proxy configured)
download.config_hint: Please set proxy in config.ini [app] section, or download the model from a cloud drive to the models directory

integrity.passed: Model integrity check passed, future checks disabled
integrity.not_passed: Model integrity: not passed (likely network unreachable), future auto-checks disabled. Main UI unaffected; configure a proxy or download the model from a cloud drive and retry.

file.too_small: Output file is empty or too small ({size} bytes): {path}

json.not_object: JSON array element [{index}] is not an object
